---
title: "teacup duplicate-block fixture"
format: html
filters:
  - teacup
teacup:
  cache: _fixture-cache
---

Two byte-identical diagrams share a content hash and a cache entry, but
must not share HTML ids — neither the root `teacup-<hash>` id nor the
scoped def ids (regression check for the occurrence counter).

```{.tikz}
\clip (0,0) rectangle (1.5,0.8);
\shade[left color=accent,right color=accent2] (0,0) rectangle (2,1);
```

```{.tikz}
\clip (0,0) rectangle (1.5,0.8);
\shade[left color=accent,right color=accent2] (0,0) rectangle (2,1);
```
